title: Restaurant Listing
description: Restaurant profile and details from a dining review platform or local business directory.

name.description: Name of the restaurant. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps, OpenTable, TripAdvisor.

cuisine_type.description: Types of cuisine served. Commonly found in: Yelp categories, Google Maps cuisine tags.

price_range.description: Price range indicator (e.g., 1-4 dollar signs). Commonly found in: Yelp price range, Google Maps price level.

address.description: Street address of the restaurant. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps, restaurant website.

city.description: City of the restaurant. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps.

state.description: State or region of the restaurant. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps.

country.description: Country of the restaurant. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate. Commonly found in: Google Maps, geocoding API.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate. Commonly found in: Google Maps, geocoding API.

phone.description: Restaurant phone number. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps, restaurant website.

website.description: Restaurant website URL. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps, restaurant website.

accepts_reservations.description: Whether the restaurant accepts reservations. Commonly found in: Yelp, OpenTable, restaurant website.

reservation_url.description: URL for making reservations. Commonly found in: OpenTable link, Resy link, restaurant website.

outdoor_seating.description: Whether outdoor seating is available. Commonly found in: Yelp attributes, Google Maps.

delivery_available.description: Whether delivery is available. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps, delivery platform.

delivery_platforms.description: Delivery platforms the restaurant is on. Commonly found in: DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub listing.

takeout_available.description: Whether takeout is available. Commonly found in: Yelp attributes, Google Maps.

alcohol_license.description: Whether the restaurant serves alcohol. Commonly found in: Yelp attributes, restaurant website.

michelin_stars.description: Number of Michelin stars. Commonly found in: Michelin Guide, restaurant website.

review_rating.description: Average review rating. Commonly found in: Yelp rating, Google Maps rating, TripAdvisor.

review_count.description: Total number of reviews. Commonly found in: Yelp, Google Maps, TripAdvisor.

top_dishes.description: Most popular or recommended dishes. Commonly found in: Yelp popular dishes, Google Maps popular dishes.

menu_url.description: URL to the restaurant's menu. Commonly found in: restaurant website, Yelp menu link.

photos.description: URLs of restaurant photos. Commonly found in: Yelp photos, Google Maps photos.

attributes.description: Additional attributes or tags. Commonly found in: Yelp attributes, Google Maps features.

source_url.description: URL of the restaurant listing page. Commonly found in: Yelp URL, Google Maps URL, TripAdvisor URL.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was extracted. Commonly found in: scraper metadata.
